contextual.title: Effects of Amlodipine/Benazepril in the Hypertensive African-American Population With Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus

metadata.brief_title: Effects of Amlodipine/Benazepril in the Hypertensive African-American Population With Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus
metadata.brief_summary: This study evaluated the efficacy and safety of amlodipine/benazepril compared with that of enalapril in the treatment of hypertension in African-American patients with type 2 diabetes.
